forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower this morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the north, slight chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then tending south to southeasterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Cloudy. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the north, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Mostly sunny. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then tending southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning and early afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower this morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning and early afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 20 to 25.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely this morning. Winds easterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 20 to 25.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, becoming less likely this afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. The chance of fog west of Nullarbor in the early morning. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Stuart Highway, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Coober Pedy. Thunderstorms possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding north of Marla early this morning. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching around 30.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain north of Leigh Creek, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds northeast to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening then tending northeast to southeasterly in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 22 to 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain in the far northeast, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek in the early morning. Winds northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 29.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching 28 to 33.
